# kEAGLColorFormatRGB565

**Global Variable**

Specifies a 16-bit RGB format that corresponds to the OpenGL ES `GL_RGB565` format.

## Declaration

```swift
let kEAGLColorFormatRGB565: String
```
title: kEAGLColorFormatRGB565
